objective: Convert the single-crate grove repository to a Cargo virtual workspace with cli/ as the sole member crate, keeping all tests green and clippy clean.
key_changes: Replaced root Cargo.toml with a virtual workspace manifest (members=["cli"], resolver="2")
Moved [profile.release] (lto=thin, strip=true) to workspace root where Cargo honours it
Created cli/Cargo.toml with all package metadata, [[bin]], and [dependencies] unchanged
readme path adjusted to ../README.md for correct cargo publish resolution from cli/
Moved src/ (8 files) to cli/src/ with no source logic changes
Fixed DEV_REGISTRY constant: /../registry instead of /registry (CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR now resolves to <repo>/cli)
Updated scripts/bump-version.sh step 1/4 to target cli/Cargo.toml for version bump
Fixed pre-existing clippy lint in cli/src/mcp.rs: OR pattern (0|1|2) -> 0..=2
Fixed pre-existing clippy lint in cli/src/ops.rs: unused .enumerate() removed
All 134 tests pass (117 unit + 17 CLI integration); cargo clippy -D warnings exits 0
